programmes.show_description: Chefs pursue a Michelin star. Picture Slam with Alan Carr. Celebs in the jungle trying to be brave. Australian dogs that misbehave. #WorldPoetryDay
Gordon, who has children with lesbian friends, is looking for a man to settle down with. Is kickboxing instructor Stephen the one? And can 'Don of the Friend Zone' David charm Zoe?
Clay-pigeon enthusiast Emma has silver fox Jeremy in her sights but faces competition from his work phone. Meanwhile, 82-year-old 'Sauve Harv' meets lifelong singleton Dinah.
The Goggleboxers watch Celebrity Race Across the World, All's Fair, Squid Game: The Challenge, The 1% Club, Come Dine with Me: Teens and Police Interceptors.
The Goggleboxers watch I'm a Celebrity..., Squid Game: The Challenge, All Her Fault, Celebrity Race Across the World, Alan Carr's Picture Slam, Knife Edge and Emmerdale.
The Cartridge Family: Marge and Lisa are horrified when Homer buys a gun. And when Bart and Milhouse find it in the fridge, Marge takes the kids to live in a motel.
New Kids on the Block: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better.
The Mixing Bowl: Bijou New York diner The Mixing Bowl is haemorrhaging money thanks to manager Mike's out-of-control marketing plans. Can Gordon get things back on track?
Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his cellmate. Dom holds the fort while Tony and Diane head to London for answers. And a revelation leaves Warren seething.
Snapped: Claire needs to clear the house before anyone makes her look bad in front of a reporter from an important women's business magazine. Jay invites Manny to a wine tasting.
Perfect Pairs: Phil, Claire, Alex and Luke love looking after the twins, but find it exhausting. But then they realise that the babies might be useful for their to-do lists...
Pool Party: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover that they have their own self-doubts.
Seascape: Gordon Ramsay visits the Seascape restaurant in the seaside village of Islip, on Long Island in New York, where owner Peter has nearly a million dollars of debt.
The Secret Garden: Gordon Ramsay visits a romantic French restaurant in California, where temperamental chef Michel Bardavid's complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away.
Large Marge: Marge accidentally gets breast implants.
Helter Skelter: The Simpsons' house must be fumigated after a hockey player gives Lisa his termite-infested stick. The only place they can find to live is in a reality TV show.
Lisa's Sax: The family recall the story of when Lisa got her saxophone. It all started when the school psychologist told Marge and Homer that her talent needed to be nurtured...
Brand new series: The newly-weds move in together and face tasks designed to make them more honest with each other. But honesty isn't always the best policy...
Brand new series: Revelations Week escalates with a confrontational task that prompts shocking confessions, brutal opinions and a blazing argument.
Bart Star: Homer takes over as the manager of Bart's American football team after forcing Ned to quit the position. Guest starring Mike Judge as Hank Hill.
The Two Mrs Nahasapeemapetilons: Marge agrees to pretend to be Apu's wife when his mother visits to set up his arranged marriage, and Homer moves into the Retirement Castle.
(2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.
Brand new series: In India's city of love, Agra, the remaining racers battle exhaustion, extreme heat and even a monsoon. But will learning a Bollywood dance be a step too far?
Mothers and Other Strangers: Homer does therapy to cope with missing his mother, sending him on a trip down memory lane, to when he and Grampa went on a road trip to find her.
A Made Maggie: Marge sends Homer to find a godfather for an as-yet-unbaptised Maggie. And who'd make a better godfather than mafia don Fat Tony?
(2011) Comedy with Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, Blake Harrison and James Buckley. School is over, so the boys celebrate with an outrageous lads holiday in Crete.
(2019) Keanu Reeves returns for the third time as the supposedly retired hitman. Someone's put a contract on John Wick's head and only a mystic in Morocco can lift it.
The Goggleboxers watch Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Love Is Blind, Strictly Come Dancing, Boiling Point, HELP! My House Is Haunted, and All Creatures Great and Small.
The TV shows include Big Brother: The Launch, Don't Look Down for SU2C, Antiques Roadshow, Coronation Street, Big Little Journeys and Beat the Chasers Celebrity Special.
Can two singletons find love based on naked attraction alone? Student Marlie needs to stay away from bad boys, while Adam from Bradford craves a woman with no secrets.
Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his cellmate. Dom holds the fort while Tony and Diane head to London for answers. And a revelation leaves Warren seething.
While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Dom's left holding the fort - but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news. And Warren is determined to get to the truth.
A revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at The Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is forced into a tough parenting dilemma.
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.
The Burger Kitchen (Part 2/2): In the second half of a two-part Nightmare in LA, can Gordon Ramsay bring together the fragmented Saffron family and save their failing restaurant?
Food in a Geoffy: Murray and Geoff have to run around Jenkintown looking for an important cheese steak after a food delivery job goes sideways.
Animal House: While Barry's love of Animal House fails to impress an elite fraternity, Beverly tries to convince Murray to take up new hobbies.
Coal Digger: The family are invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football, but an incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things awkward for Gloria and Claire.
Run for Your Wife: On the kids' first day back at school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire's coping with an empty nest.
Brand new series: Revelations Week escalates with a confrontational task that prompts shocking confessions, brutal opinions and a blazing argument.
Gym boss Rebecca wants to get her love life in shape. She likes 'tattooed guys who look like trouble'. And can Adam help forever-single Sophie believe in men again?
Luigi's: Gordon Ramsay travels to Orange County, Southern California, to try to save Italian restaurant Luigi's from disaster.
Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times: Homer's misguided revenge on Cletus combined with an untimely car breakdown leaves the Simpsons telling tales of revenge gone wrong.
Little Big Girl: Lisa invents fragments of her family's history to impress her classmates, but feels guilty about lying. Bart thinks he's got a girl pregnant by kissing her.
Fears: When Phil and Luke embark on a discovery expedition underneath the house, Phil tries not to let his fear of the dark and of creepy crawlies get the best of him.
Truth Be Told: After reconnecting on Facebook, Phil invites his old high school girlfriend to drop by the house, but the friendly visit quickly turns into trouble.
Brand new series: Revelations Week escalates with a confrontational task that prompts shocking confessions, brutal opinions and a blazing argument.
The final week begins in Almancil in Portugal, as two new arrivals kick off a dramatic and shocking twist that puts every celeb's place on the coach at risk...
24 Minutes: In a parody of the action series 24, Bart and Lisa must stop bullies releasing a stink bomb at school.
You Kent Always Say What You Want: After spilling coffee on his lap, Kent Brockman swears on live TV and gets fired. So Kent and Lisa team up to broadcast inconvenient truths.
Mercedes is determined to find out what Jenson's up to. Wanting to bring happiness during a difficult time, Ste makes a big decision. And a sister is backed into a corner.
...Australia - Brand new series: The first Commitment Ceremony brings some brutal honesty. And the simmering tensions between the brides erupt into a fiery showdown.
Brand new series: Does Jazz have feelings for Inga? Jules and Tristan are furious with Chuggs. Freddy's back in Beks' bad books. Alice and Sam Vanderpump throw their baby shower.
Welcome to Wrexham, The Good Ship Murder, Married at First Sight UK, Coronation Street and Nadiya's Simple Spices are just some of the great TV shows up for review.
